# terrible_validate_argument_spec (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `argument_spec` (String) A dictionary like AnsibleModule argument_spec. See the C(options) parameter for the R(specification format,role_argument_spec).
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `provided_arguments` (String) A dictionary of the arguments that will be validated according to argument_spec.

### Read-Only

- `argument_errors` (String) A list of arg validation errors.
- `argument_spec_data` (String) A dict of the data from the 'argument_spec' arg.
- `validate_args_context` (String) A dict of info about where validate_args_spec was used
